title: Day Counter (Original)
description: For Minecraft 1.16 - Latest! This datapack/mod add text on top of your hotbar that will count the day realtime.
body:
Introducing a custom datapack/mod designed to enhance your gameplay experience by displaying a day counter directly above your hotbar. 

## Version
Theres a version that will count the day from 1 and a version that will count the day from 0, providing a straightforward way to track your days. It is capable of counting beyond 100 days.

Example video by rekrap1 (not affiliated with us)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OMVKfNHh1Sg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This tool was specifically created for 100 days video, making it an ideal solution for anyone looking to monitor their progress effectively. You are welcome to utilize this datapack/mod in any way you see fit, with no requirement for attribution.

## Command
You can adjust the day to any value using this command.
```
/time set 10d
```
However, be cautious, as this will also change the day in your world, which will be reflected in the F3 menu as well.
